title: 日本ダービーの後に・運命の明星

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First place goes to Admire Vega! Admire Vega is
our Derby champion!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(The cheering... the thunderous noise is almost
numbing.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(I feel like I'm floating. I feel hot... It's making it
hard to stand.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(This heat... It's coming from my heart! My heart's
on fire!)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I kept Top Road from catching up.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
How did it feel to gather every last ounce of your
strength and dash down what seems like an
endless final stretch?

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
How did it feel to be showered with cheers and
applause?

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Mother
text_block_list.text: Did you take it all in and live in the moment?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Aaaaagh! I can't believe this! Talk about
frustrating!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: This just makes me want to beat you even more.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep training during summer camp. I'll focus on
stamina as much as I can!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: This time, at the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I meet Admire Vega in the prep room after the
race.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Opera O was there... and Top Road too.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list: I knew you could pull it off.
I knew you could pull it off.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list:
I knew you had what it takes. After all, I've seen
your final spurt!

I knew you had what it takes. After all, I've seen
your final spurt!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She quickly goes off to prepare for the winning
concert. As I watch her, I feel reinvigorated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Kikuka Sho, the final race of the Classic
Triple Crown, coming next, I'll do everything I can
to make sure she excels again!
